comments.comment: Bisphenol A was a Part 1A substance (10 tonne mass threshold and 1% concentration threshold), but, new for the 2014 reporting year, now has a 100 kilogram mass threshold and 1% concentration threshold. The facility was well below the Part 1A threshold, but exceeds the new Part 1B threshold.

There was a labour strike at the facility during in 2012. It was not completely shut down, but ran on a limited basis using managerial staff, which had on impact on production. There was no such labour strike in 2013.
